instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下所有已付款的订单
output: SELECT id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = '已付款';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 今年新入职的员工有多少
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_hires FROM employees WHERE hire_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01');

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下价格超过1000的产品
output: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price > 1000 ORDER BY price DESC;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 上海地区的客户有多少
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS shanghai_customers FROM customers WHERE city = '上海';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下上个月退货的订单
output: SELECT id, total_amount, created_at FROM orders WHERE status = '已退货' AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m');

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 每个供应商的产品数量
output: SELECT supplier, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY supplier ORDER BY product_count DESC;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下年薪超过20万的员工
output: SELECT name, salary, position FROM employees WHERE salary > 200000;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 每个城市的平均订单金额
output: SELECT c.city, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_amount FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.city ORDER BY avg_amount DESC;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下销量最好的产品类别
output: SELECT p.category, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_sold FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 1;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下本月的订单总额
output: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS month_total FROM orders WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE());

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 工龄超过5年的员工名单
output: SELECT name, hire_date, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), hire_date) / 365 AS years FROM employees WHERE DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), hire_date) / 365 > 5;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下各部门预算排名
output: SELECT name, budget FROM departments ORDER BY budget DESC;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 库存最多的前3种产品
output: SELECT name, stock FROM products ORDER BY stock DESC LIMIT 3;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 北京地区的VIP客户有哪些
output: SELECT id, name, email FROM customers WHERE city = '北京' AND level = 'VIP';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下每个部门有多少人
output: SELECT d.name, COUNT(e.id) AS count FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 订单金额超过5000的订单详情
output: SELECT o.id, c.name, o.total_amount, o.created_at FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.total_amount > 5000;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下已发货但未付款的订单
output: SELECT id, total_amount, created_at FROM orders WHERE status = '已发货';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: VIP客户的总消费额
output: SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) AS vip_total FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.level = 'VIP';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下平均订单金额最高的城市
output: SELECT c.city, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.city ORDER BY avg_order DESC LIMIT 1;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 研发部员工的平均薪资
output: SELECT AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE d.name = '研发部';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下所有待处理的订单
output: SELECT id, customer_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = '待处理';

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 注册时间最近的10个客户
output: SELECT id, name, registered_at FROM customers ORDER BY registered_at DESC LIMIT 10;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 订单数量超过5的客户
output: SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5 ORDER BY order_count DESC;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下每个部门的最高薪资
output: SELECT d.name, MAX(e.salary) AS max_salary FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下上个月的订单总数
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m');

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下本季度的订单总数
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE QUARTER(o.created_at) = QUARTER(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE());

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下今年的订单总数
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE());

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下最近30天的订单总数
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 上个月的总销售额是多少
output: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m');

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 本季度的总销售额是多少
output: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o WHERE QUARTER(o.created_at) = QUARTER(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE());

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 今年的总销售额是多少
output: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o WHERE YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE());

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 最近30天的总销售额是多少
output: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o WHERE o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下上个月销售额最高的产品是什么
output: SELECT p.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下上个月各部门的订单数
output: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.customer_id = e.id JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY d.id, d.name;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下本季度各部门的订单数
output: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.customer_id = e.id JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE QUARTER(o.created_at) = QUARTER(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY d.id, d.name;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。

output: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.customer_id = e.id JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE YEAR(o.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY d.id, d.name;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下最近30天各部门的订单数
output: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.customer_id = e.id JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY d.id, d.name;

instruction: 将自然语言问题转换为MySQL查询语句。
input: 查一下上个月销售额最高的部门
output: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.customer_id = e.id JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
